name_cn:
Chane1🆕25s New Passport Holder
Ball grain Black / Light gold buckle
Purchased from the counter for 5500rmb~
🔥Hotly launching Chane1 Classic Passport Holder
Ball grain calfskin, meets exquisite luxury ✨
Small Size easily holds passport, boarding pass,
credit cards, etc... Travel essential〰️
Keep you elegant and composed during your journey
Hardware: Full steel thick 14K light gold buckle
Face leather: Exclusive Haas ball grain calfskin
Lining leather: Montebello burgundy calfskin
Dimensions: 14.5*10.5*2 cm
